Module storm.core

Package st.orm.core.template.impl

package st.orm.core.template.impl
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    st.orm.core.template
     
  • Class
    Description
    AliasedTable
    Represents a reference to a table qualified with an alias.
    BindHint
    Marker interface that represents a binding hint used during SQL template binding.
    BindHint.NoBindHint
    Represents the absence of a binding hint.
    BindVarsHandle
    Handle used to process bind variables.
    Cacheable
    Wrapper element that marks an Elements.Expression as cacheable during template compilation.
    ColumnExpression
    Represents a reference to a column qualified by a table alias, with optional SQL expression override.
    ColumnImpl
    Represents a column in a database table.
    ColumnName
     
    DatabaseSchema
    Reads JDBC DatabaseMetaData into an in-memory representation for schema validation.
    DatabaseSchema.DbColumn
    Represents a column discovered from the database metadata.
    DatabaseSchema.DbForeignKey
    Represents a foreign key relationship discovered from the database metadata.
    DatabaseSchema.DbPrimaryKey
    Represents a primary key column discovered from the database metadata.
    DatabaseSchema.DbUniqueKey
    Represents a column that is part of a unique index discovered from the database metadata.
    DeleteBuilderImpl<T extends Data,ID>
    A query builder for DELETE queries.

    Builds allocation-free equality checks for metamodel fields backed by MethodHandle.
    ExceptionHelper
    Helper class for augmenting exceptions with SQL statements.
    Identical<T>
    Identity comparison on an extracted field value.
    JoinedEntityHelper
    Utility for handling multi-table DML operations for joined sealed entity types (Joined Table inheritance).

    LazySupplier<T>
    Returns a lazily initialized value.
    LruCache<K,V>
    A simple in-memory Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.
    MetamodelFactory
    Implementation that is used by the generated models.
    ModelBuilder
    Builder for creating a model.
    ModelImpl<E extends Data,ID>
    Default Model implementation backed by RecordType and precomputed column metadata.
    ObjectMapper<T>
    Mapper for creating instances of a specific type.
    ObjectMapperFactory
    Factory for creating instances of a specific type.
    ORMTemplateImpl
     
    PredicateBuilderFactory
    Factory for creating instances of PredicateBuilder.
    PreparedStatementTemplateImpl
     
    Same<T>
    Value comparison on an extracted field value.
    SchemaValidationError
    Describes a single mismatch between an entity definition and the database schema.
    SchemaValidationError.ErrorKind
    The category of a schema validation error.
    SchemaValidationException
    Thrown when schema validation detects one or more mismatches between entity definitions and the database schema.
    SchemaValidator
    Validates entity and projection definitions against the actual database schema.
    SegmentedLruCache<K,V>
    A sharded LRU cache optimized for concurrent, read-dominated workloads.
    SelectBuilderImpl<T extends Data,R,ID>
    A query builder for SELECT queries.
    SqlCompiler
    Represents the SQL result of processing a template element.
    SqlInterceptorManager
    Manages SQL interceptors.
    SqlInterceptorManager.Carrier
     
    SqlLogInterceptor
    Shared utility for processing SqlLog annotations in repository proxies.
    SqlTemplateImpl
    The sql template implementation that is responsible for generating SQL queries.
    StringTemplates
    Utility class for processing string templates.
    Subqueryable
    The query template is used to construct queries that may be linked to the outer query.
    TableName
     
    TemplateMetrics
    Singleton JMX MBean for SQL template cache metrics.
    TemplateMetrics.Request
     
    TemplateMetricsMXBean
    JMX MXBean interface for template cache metrics.
    TypeCompatibility
    Determines whether a Java type is compatible with a SQL column type.
    TypeCompatibility.Compatibility
    Describes the compatibility between a Java type and a SQL column type.
